blended.narrative: Solitude is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.5 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 5,250 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 6 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 4" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
